description: Add social media icon links to the site footer

userStories.title: Social Media Icons in Footer
userStories.description: Add a row of social media icons (YouTube, Twitter/X, Instagram) to the footer component with links to placeholder URLs
acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays at least 3 social media icons
Icons use SVG or a consistent icon approach
Each icon links to a placeholder URL (e.g., https://youtube.com)
Icons are visually balanced and properly spaced

userStories.title: Social Icon Hover Effects
userStories.description: Add hover animations to social icons for better interactivity - color change or scale effect
